_layout: Documentation of grass.png tile organization. Paths relative to project root. Adjust grass_shoreline mapping to match your tile visuals. N=1,E=2,S=4,W=8 for water adjacency bitmask.
_rules: Grass tile cannot be placed on top of water (~ or `).
Hills (I) are placed only on grass tiles (G).
Ocean (continent mode): min 2 tiles wide. Outermost = deep (`), inner = shallow (~). Same as lake: interior water (4 neighbors) -> deep; min 1-tile shallow next to land/B.
B = continent shoreline: grass adjacent to ocean shallow water. Water connected via NESW to the 2-tile ocean border.
L = lake shoreline: inland water (not connected to ocean). Grass adjacent to lakes/ponds.
Lake outline (L) tiles need at least 2 NESW sides touching another lake tile (water or L) to avoid diagonals.
Lake deep water (`): only in lakes (not ocean). Min 1-tile shallow border around deep water. Lake shorelines (L) cannot be placed on deep water tiles.
R = river bank: rivers that do NOT connect to the ocean. Rivers with ocean outlet use B.
Shoreline = 1 tile border around continent perimeter. No grass (G), trees (T/F), hills (I), dirt (P), etc. on shoreline. Connected via NESW (no diagonal-only links).
Trees cannot be placed on B/L/R.
Join (J) and POI (S, M, H, C, D, N) cannot be placed on B/L/R.
Dirt (P) must be at least 1 tile away (8-neighbor) from shoreline (B/L/R), water (~/`), hills (I), and trees (T/F).
Shoreline: shoreline_path (shorelines.aseprite) uses shoreline.shoreline_map for bitmask->tile. Override shoreline_map to match your sheet layout.
After fill_hill_interior, map_gen runs apply_grass_hill_cliffline_repair (G I G I along a row/column) so thin cliff chokes do not isolate grass; see hill_topology.py.

Hill PNG: apply_hill_diagonal_inset_neighbor_rules supports SE/NW checkerboard insets (mirror SW/NE); tune hill.rim_continuation / rim_second_pass / diagonal_inset_2x2 if rim tile ids need adjustment.

grass.description: Tiles 1-13: grass. 1 = default, 2-13 = variations. default_weight > 0.5 ensures tile 1 uses >50% of interior grass.

hill_map._comment: Cardinals 1,2,4,8 = peninsula ends N→12,E→11,S→10,W→13. Mask 15 = 4-way connector (tile 14); plateau interior is grass in painter.
hill_map._mask5_note: Vertical ridge (mask 5): second pass picks left cliff 9 vs right cliff 7 from N/S neighbor tile ids; default spine tile is this value.
hill_map._mask5_tile24_note: When E/W are not hill and all four diagonals (NW,NE,SW,SE) are open grass-like land, tile 24 is used instead of 5/9 (see hill_mask5_vertical_spine_open_diagonals_for_tile24).
hill_map._mask10_note: Horizontal ridge default spine (E–W); second pass: tile 6 if W=2 or W mask-10 continuation and E=3 or E mask-10 continuation; tile 8 if W=4 / E=5 with same rules; ambiguous spine middle stays default (8).
hill_map._mask11_note: Mask 11 (N+E+W, S open): after first pass, hill_map[11] tee is kept only if some cardinal hill neighbor tile id is in mask11_tee_neighbor_tile_ids (default 10–14 ∪ 23–33); else hill_map[10]. Then ridge pass may set mask11_extension_connect_tile when W/E match mask11_w_corner_tile_for_extension / mask11_e_extension_neighbor_tile.

diagonal_inset_2x2._comment: Optional 2×2 art grid (tl,tr,bl,br) for concave diagonal insets. null = grass; int = hill tile id. Outer corners usually 2–5 (see 2x2_corners); inset corners 34–37. Consumed by paint_map_to_png (overlays + corner ids for apply_hill_diagonal_inset_neighbor_rules).

hill._mask11_tee_gate: Optional list mask11_tee_neighbor_tile_ids overrides default frozenset 10–14 and 23–33 for when hill_map[11] (tee) is allowed vs replaced by hill_map[10].
hill._peninsula_vertical_spine: After ridge pass: walk from mask 1 / mask 4 along mask-5 spines; peninsula_extend_tile default 24; mask 7/13/11 bulk E/W → peninsula_tee_* (15–17, 16). Then peninsula_protrusion_fix (raw tips 1/2/4/8). If diagonal inset runs, peninsula_post_inset_tile_restore reapplies those tip tiles after inset + spine fix. Disable spine with peninsula_vertical_spine false or {enabled:false}.
hill._peninsula_post_inset_restore: After diagonal inset + vertical spine fix, restore tile ids for raw cardinal peninsula tips (1,2,4,8) from a snapshot taken just before inset. Disable with peninsula_post_inset_tile_restore false.

peninsula_protrusion._comment: First hill inward from raw tips 1/2/4/8. Mask 1 south end: E/W hill → south_end_interior_n_tee (21); E/W grass → 24. Mask 2/8: N/S grass → west/east_end_interior_*_extender (8 = hill_map[10]); set extender 23 for narrow horizontal nib if needed.

hill._mask14_n_peninsula: Mask 14 (N open, S+E+W hill): ridge pass sets mask14_peninsula_n_tile (21) when N not hill and E/W resolved tiles are mask14_ew_neighbor_tile (8) and S is in mask14_south_neighbor_tiles (10,24). Disable with mask14_n_peninsula_connector false.
hill._mask14_south_raw_tips: When S tile id is wrong after inset (e.g. 7), still use tile mask14_peninsula_n_tile if S raw hill mask is a single-neighbor tip in this list.
hill._diagonal_inset_skip_pen_tips: When true (default), skip rim overrides for (inset, rim dir, raw mask) triples in _DIAGONAL_INSET_SKIP_RIM_PENINSULA_TIP_TRIPLES (e.g. SW w + mask 1, NE n + mask 1) so N-only peninsula tips keep tee/peninsula tiles.
hill._diagonal_inset_swap_sw_ne: When true (default), SW notch sites use hill.diagonal_inset_2x2.ne art and NE sites use .sw (sheet labels often swapped vs engine). Set false for literal key match.
hill._diagonal_inset_swap_nw_se: When true (default), NW geometry uses diagonal_inset_2x2.se and SE uses .nw. Set false for literal key match.
hill._diagonal_inset_ne_overrides: NE 2×2: BR uses 4 (grass) or 9 (hill) for cell one row above BR (same column as TR); TL uses 8 when hill is one column left of TL.
hill._diagonal_inset_sw_overrides: SW 2×2: TL uses tile 7 (grass) or 3 (hill) for cell two rows below TL; BR uses 3 (grass) or 6 (hill) for cell two columns left of BR. Disable per rule with diagonal_inset_sw_*_override false.
hill._diagonal_inset_se_overrides: SE 2×2: TR uses 9 (grass) or 2 (hill) for cell one row below TR; BL uses 6 (hill) or 2 (grass) for cell one column left of BL.
hill._diagonal_inset_nw_overrides: NW 2×2: TR uses 8 (hill) or 5 (grass) for cell two columns left of TR; BL uses 7 (hill) or 5 (grass) for cell two rows above BL.
hill._diagonal_bridge: Optional. Set diagonal_bridge: true to paste 2x2 hill corners on ASCII grass where hills only meet diagonally. Default false so grass (G/.) stays grass-only in the PNG.
hill._cardinal_connects: Bits 1,2,4,8 → peninsula tiles 12,11,10,13 (N,E,S,W). Ridges: mask 5→9 (default spine), 10→8. Three-open: 7→28, 11→32, 13→30, 14→26.
hill._interior_protrusion: Mask 15: second pass uses neighbors' first-pass tile IDs; see paint_map_png resolve_hill_mask15_protrusion_tile_id.
hill._diagonal_inference: Hill bitmask uses the same diagonal corner upgrade as lake water (_hill_mask_with_diagonal_inference).
hill._diagonal_combo: Dark blue: NW gap tile 2, SE gap tile 5. Light blue: NE gap tile 3, SW gap tile 4.
hill._sheet_art_notes: Human-only: inset-style tiles on the hill sheet (28/29/31/32/36/37). Concave grass-notch insets: NW 34, NE 35, SW 36, SE 37 (see diagonal_inset_2x2).
hill._layout: 1=isolated; 2–5=corners; 6–9=edges; 10=vert ridge; 11=horiz ridge; 14=mesa; 15–27=protrusion set; 28+ junctions; 34–37 concave inset corners; 38 spare/alternate

lake.description: When lakesrivers_path is set: tiles 1-9 in lakesrivers.aseprite. lake_map maps bitmask 0-15 to 1-based tile index. special_tiles: south_of_n_edge (49), deep_n_shallow_ew_land_s (6 for ~ with N=deep,E=~,S=land,W=~). interior_lake_tiles [49,50,51,52] for L cells in interior clusters.
lake._interior_cases: 1: NESW all water (L/R/~/`) -> blank. 2: N(tile3)+W(tile3)->49. 3: S(tile2)+W(tile2)->51. 4: N(tile5)+E(tile5)->50. 5: E(tile4)+S(tile4)->52. 6: 3+ lake neighbors + shallow water neighbor -> blank. tile2=mask3, tile3=mask6, tile4=mask9, tile5=mask12.

lake_map._comment: N=1,E=2,S=4,W=8. Derived from lake_shoreline (51-59) minus 50 for lakesrivers.aseprite 1-9.

river.description: When lakesrivers_path is set: tiles 10-11. Masks 5=N+S (vertical), 10=E+W (horizontal).

shoreline.description: shoreline_path (shorelines.aseprite) is used for continent shoreline when set. Tiles 1-35. shoreline_map maps bitmask 0-15 to 1-based tile index. Match range to your sheet tile count.

grass_shoreline._comment: Bitmask N=1,E=2,S=4,W=8. When using grass.png for shoreline (no shoreline_path): tile indices 98-118. When shoreline_path set: use shoreline.shoreline_map instead.
